articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

keyEvents.text: Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Antonio Morgan replaces Shalon Knight because of an injury.
First Half ends, Honduras 0, Antigua and Barbuda 0.
Second Half begins Honduras 0, Antigua and Barbuda 0.
Goal! Honduras 1, Antigua and Barbuda 0. Getsel Montes (Honduras) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Joseph Rosales with a cross following a corner.
Sean Tomlinson (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Drake Hadeed replaces Jahzihno O'Garro.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Raheem Deterville replaces Karique Knight.
Raheem Deterville (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card.

Substitution, Honduras. Yustin Arboleda replaces Anthony Lozano.
Substitution, Honduras. Alexy Vega replaces Alexander López.
Substitution, Honduras. Edwin Rodríguez replaces Romell Quioto.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. D'Andre Bishop replaces Tyrik Hughes.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Shakore Simon replaces Zafique Drew.
Goal! Honduras 2, Antigua and Barbuda 0. Alexy Vega (Honduras) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Yustin Arboleda.
Substitution, Honduras. Luis Crisanto replaces Andy Nájar.
Substitution, Honduras. Carlos Mejía replaces Luis Palma.
Second Half ends, Honduras 2, Antigua and Barbuda 0.
